CustomField.description: Transient-safe batch size override set by resumeJob() when the user resumes after a hot-loop pause. DependencyQueueable reads this field at the start of the resumed execution and uses it instead of Scan_Batch_Size__c. Persisted on the job record so it survives across Queueable self-chain boundaries. Null during normal execution. Do not edit manually. Ref: ISP-6072
CustomField.label: Batch Size Override
